title: drop dead korczewski-website dir + stale dashboard refs
description:
## Summary

- Delete the `korczewski-website/` directory (slim standalone Astro site, 7,886 lines). It hasn't been built since the unified `website/` codebase took over both brands — `task website:build ENV=korczewski` always uses `website/Dockerfile` and only borrows the dir name for the ghcr.io image tag (`WEBSITE_IMAGE: korczewski-website`).
- Drop two `CLAUDE.md` references to a `task feature:dashboard` / `task dashboard:web:deploy:all-prods` umbrella task that ceased to exist when the operator dashboard was consolidated into `web.\${PROD_DOMAIN}/admin/monitoring` in #555.
- Update the README directory tree accordingly.

## Context

Today's session caught `web.korczewski.de/admin/monitoring` returning 404 because the deployed image (`ghcr.io/paddione/korczewski-website:latest`) was still the old slim site — nobody had pushed a fresh build since the unified codebase took the build pipeline. `task website:redeploy ENV=korczewski` rebuilt + pushed + rolled, fixing the 404 and confirming the slim source dir is dead code.

## Test plan

- [x] `task website:redeploy ENV=korczewski` runs cleanly (already verified pre-PR — pod healthy, /admin/monitoring redirects to Keycloak)
- [x] `grep -r 'korczewski-website/'` finds no remaining references in scripts/manifests/CI
- [ ] CI green

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
